reviews.review_title: Good game, nice movement, nice workout
reviews.review_description: I love it. I've included the game in my work-out routine. I'm missing a restart level option and maybe an in game timer. Speed running this game makes it better.

reviews.review_title: This game returning me to childhood.
reviews.review_description: This game is blast. Movement is fluid. Whe you like parkour in real life this game is goood.The only prompts I have is that when a person turns back time, the environment flows on and does not return either.  Everything is good. Grafic is simple but feels good. Thanks for game.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We’ll try to do our best job in future updates.

reviews.review_description: I am really loving this game. The controls are excellent although they take a little bit of practice because they are quite unique, different but intuitive I think. once you get the hang of it you will be sprinting and even flying about the maps with the excellent air control. The maps are very well put together and all have a distinct look and map features Time rewind is cool it can save you from short or mistimed jumps and even extend your jumps when you realise how to use that. Ive finished the game now which was tough. The last level was fairly brutal tbh. Now that I've beaten it I went back to the levels to pickup the collectables I'd missed and also to compete on the leaderboards. Graphics are great, the music I really liked and it fits the game well. Honestly the only negative thing i can think to say is that I did encounter some bugs. Over the course of beating the game and replaying all the levels multiple times I saw a few more than once. Hopefully the Devs can fix a few of them.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! 
About the bugs... We promise to fix them ASAP.

reviews.review_description: Next Move VR is a new Virtual Reality Platformer that is a mixed between Mario, Prince Of Persia, and Guerilla Tag. I was not expecting much from this game at first because I am not a fan of this type of movement system but I was immediately eating my words. The movement is similar to Guerilla Tag but with its own spin on it. The controls are actually very simple to use and almost intuitive with pumping your arms to run, turning your body to spin around, and thrusting your arms into the air to jump. The levels are very cool looking. Even though they are polygon like, the graphics work well with the vibe of the game and dont need to be polished IMHO. Moving from basic jumps, to moving platforms, dodging spikes, and even enemies from the air,  this game has you wanting to get good, fast. The more you die the more you want to keep playing! As you progress more and more, mechanics are added to the game such as guns, and zip lines. The game is very unique and has you wanting to see how far and fast you can beat the levels. This is every VR platformers dream wrapped up in a nice bundle.

reviews.review_title: A hidden gem of a VR game.
reviews.review_description: I've spent about 20 hours playing this VR platformer and I'm hugely impressed. Probably the best new VR game I've played this year. Great game mechanics and controls, beautiful art style, and interesting and varied levels. I've made a video review of my thoughts on it. https://youtu.be/iXTaQsPfYNg?si=CSS_Fn_jUl2EYvsH

I have been having so much fun playing this! It makes you feel like a super hero with all the things you can do in the game :) I highly recommend getting it  and experiencing it for yourself! 10/10 from me. It's comfortable and immersive also a challenge which I love!

reviews.review_title: VR Immersion is HERE  gotta Play this !
reviews.review_description:
This game has it all a completely immersive parkour game to be found right here welcome to Next Move where every step or jump you make whether swinging your arms to run fast/slow and jump like hell really is the point in this game and don't even start me on the awesome labrynth of routes this game has to offer I have had to dodge bullets from cannons shoot the birdies traverse across canoes / fast and bewildering is what I would put this game down as omg it's awesome a huge 5 stars from me wow the moment of wow starts as I take my first few steps in this unknown swinging my arms like a mad man to run and turn only to find myself losing my bearings and pausing to think about where I'm going next hence the whole title
welcome to Next Move omg I love immersion and this is the first time I've been totally lost in an awesome world that forever keeps me on my toes and my brain ticking away at where and what do I have to do to get through this bit.
I absolutely love the whole rewind feature too as many a time I've mistimed my jumps and oh dear but with the rewind I can like stop midair and alter where I fell or land haha that's so darn cool I've spent a few hours in this game and the whole shooting while running and ducking and diving about is phenomenal the Immersive feeling is here from the start and never feels out of place
I highly recommend trying this folks it's so surreal and exhilerating ! You will work up a sweat but especially it's just all out fun.

Wait till you see the way the maps have been designed everything from moving ledges to leaping for my life and just hope like heck I make it haha huge thumbs up to the Dev of this game I can see a heck of a lot of thought went into the design and orientation. 

A must try VR immersive Game and wow do I mean IMMERSIVE.
The sheer amount of turning I did involved me just twisting my body to face in the direction where you are in control of where to go 
wow !!!

plan your NEXT MOVE carefully ,wisely or just plain go for it there's race moments where you have to reach a goal in a set amount of time or try try again haha 

Enjoy I certainly Am 
A pleasure to rate this at 5 Stars 
Highly Recommend
This game's now a top pick for me. The mechanics got me moving and sweating, and the visuals are impressive. No motion sickness is a big plus. Excited to keep playing and beat my high score!
The immersion in this game is INCREDIBLE, however I’m prone to motion sickness and this one got me. But even with that said, the gameplay is fantastic and worth exploring!

The games gets better and better with every new movement technique, flying is so much fun! :DD 

And those levels looks fantastic
